title: Claude Code refuses requests or charges extra if your commits mention "OpenClaw"
author: elmean
aiHeadline: Claude Code: 'Sure, I'll help you, but only if you don't mention that pesky OpenClaw thing... or else!'

title: Belgium stops decommissioning nuclear power plants
author: mpweiher
aiHeadline: Belgium: 'Why take risks with renewable energy when we can just keep our fingers crossed and hope the nuclear reactors don't explode?'

title: Mozilla's opposition to Chrome's Prompt API
author: jaffathecake
aiHeadline: Mozilla: 'We're not just mad about Chrome; we're writing a whole issue about it!'

title: Can I disable all data collection from my vehicle?
author: Cider9986
aiHeadline: Can I disable all data collection from my vehicle? Well, good luck with that, because your car probably already knows more about you than your therapist does.

title: Meta in row after workers who saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
author: gorbachev
aiHeadline: Meta: 'We're all about privacy, except when our workers accidentally witness some... interesting activities while testing our smart glasses.'
